data.title: Ohio's two nursing programs reveal the impact of US limits on student borrowing, showing the potential consequences.
data.description: In Ohio, there are two nursing school programs showcasing the potential outcomes of restricted federal student borrowing.

data.title: 250th birthday celebrations in America include Girl Scouts singing, flag party, and Times Square ball drop.
data.description: To celebrate the Semiquincentennial, events such as Girl Scouts performing folk songs, a flag-waving party, and a Times Square ball drop are planned. The festivities will mark 250 years since the founding in a vibrant display of patriotism and tradition. Various activities and performances will take place, symbolizing the historical significance of this milestone. The celebrations will draw attention from locals and tourists alike, with an expected turnout of thousands of attendees ready to commemorate this special occasion in their respective communities.

data.title: Rental car accident in Australia. Thrifty kept couple's full deposit for a year, didn't provide needed invoice for insurance claim.
data.description: A rental car company, Thrifty, reportedly held onto a couple's entire deposit for more than a year following an incident in Australia. The company allegedly refused to supply the couple with the necessary invoice required for an insurance claim.

Orban enters stage to take part in board of peace ceremony

data.title: New breast cancer therapy, NERLYNX, launched in Thailand for HER2+ patients, reducing recurrence risk & improving survival.
data.description: Women in Thailand who are eligible and diagnosed with Human Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor 2 positive (HER2+) breast cancer now have access to a new therapy called NERLYNX® (neratinib). This treatment option has been launched for the first time in the country. NERLYNX serves as a significant addition to available treatments for these women. It provides a new avenue of treatment for those with HER2+ breast cancer, expanding the range of options for patients.

data.title: Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, Inc. names Stephanie Mills Honorary member on Jan 21, 2026, part of 2026 inductions.
data.description: In an update from Washington on January 22, 2026, it was reported that Zeta Phi Beta Sorority Incorporated, a prominent women's service organization in the United States, revealed the initiation of the 2026 Honorary Member inductions at Alpha Omega chapter on January 21, 2026. This announcement marked a significant event for the Sorority as they welcomed new members.

data.title: VistaPrint ranked as top choice for custom business cards in 2026 by Expert Consumers for small businesses.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 22, 2026, Expert Consumers has awarded VistaPrint the title of best provider of business cards for small businesses. The company has been acknowledged for its exceptional performance in offering a wide range of customization options, a variety of materials, and cost-effective pricing strategies tailored to meet the needs of modern small businesses. This recognition highlights VistaPrint's dedication to meeting the demands of small enterprises looking to create impactful business cards.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer names Tejas Shah as EVP, Chief Strategy & Innovation Officer, aiming to drive company growth.
data.description: Today, Wolters Kluwer revealed the hiring of Tejas Shah as their new Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy & Innovation Officer. He will play a crucial role in guiding the company's strategic initiatives and fostering innovation.

data.title: BitGo to debut on Wall Street with first 2026 crypto IPO, offering 11,026,365 shares at $18 per share, aiming to raise $198.47M.
data.description: BitGo Holdings Inc. is gearing up for its Wall Street premiere on Thursday as the first cryptocurrency firm to go public this year. The company is set to list shares on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "BTGO", with 11,026,365 shares of Class A common stock up for grabs. In addition, existing shareholders will offer 795,230 shares of Class A common stock, all priced at $18 per share. This move is expected to raise a total of $198.47 million for BitGo. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
